claim_boundary: Read-only transport of an already released computational dual-conformation geometry teacher. This is not binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, or Docking Gold evidence.

immutable_publication.publication_method: rename staging into by_sha256 followed by atomic relative symlink creation

security_gates: production canonical paths are exact and implementation hashes are verified before remote access
remote status must be COMPLETE and archive plus checksum must be regular non-symlink files
download is staged and bounded by a frozen maximum byte count
archive SHA256 must match the remote checksum record
tar member names must exactly match the frozen allowlist
all archive members must be regular files; links, devices, duplicate names, traversal and absolute paths are rejected
outputs/SHA256SUMS must contain exactly the four frozen payload files and every hash must verify
teacher, audit, receipt and evaluator closure must pass before publication
publication is content-addressed and an existing different current pointer is never replaced
